rule: Use sticky navigation on long pages
do_pattern: Fixed nav that stays visible on scroll
do_code: position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
dont_pattern: Nav disappears on scroll forcing users to scroll back up

rule: Add smooth scroll for anchor links
do_pattern: Smooth scrolling to sections on click
do_code: html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } /* or scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }) */
dont_pattern: Instant jump to section disorienting user
dont_code: /* no smooth scroll default jump behavior */

do_code: Use IntersectionObserver to toggle .active class on nav links

do_pattern: Show navigation path for nested content
dont_pattern: No way to navigate back in deep hierarchies
dont_code: /* no breadcrumb users must use back button */

do_pattern: Disable animations for users who prefer it

dont_pattern: Linear motion feels robotic and unnatural

dont_code: width: 0; /* animate to full width causes layout thrash */

dont_pattern: Placeholder-only labels that disappear on focus

do_pattern: Error messages next to the relevant field
do_code: Please enter a valid email
dont_pattern: Errors only at top of form or alert boxes
dont_code: alert('Please fix the errors'); /* bad UX */

do_pattern: Correct HTML5 input types for mobile keyboards
Display requirements before user starts typing
dont_pattern: Only showing requirements after failed submission
Low contrast light gray on white
Div soup with no semantic meaning

rule: Make all interactive elements keyboard accessible
Add alt text to all images
do_pattern: Descriptive alt text for content images
dont_pattern: Empty or missing alt text on content images

rule: Use ARIA labels for icon buttons
dont_pattern: Icon buttons with no accessible name

do_pattern: Load images only when approaching viewport
dont_pattern: Loading all images on page load
Single large image for all viewports

dont_code: /* no width/height set images cause layout shift */

do_pattern: Font display swap with system fallback
dont_pattern: Flash of invisible text while fonts load
dont_code: font-display: block; /* invisible text until font loads */
/* no preload critical assets load late */

do_pattern: Primary secondary and ghost button styles
do_code: Primary: solid bg + white text. Secondary: outline. Ghost: text only
dont_pattern: All buttons look the same no hierarchy
dont_code: /* all buttons same style no visual priority */

dont_pattern: Small buttons hard to tap on mobile
dont_code: padding: 4px 8px; font-size: 12px; /* too small for touch */
/* no loading state user clicks multiple times */

dont_pattern: Generic text like Click Here or Submit

do_code: max-width: 65ch; or max-width: 680px for text content
dont_code: width: 100%; /* text spans full viewport hard to read */

dont_pattern: Fixed width layouts that break on mobile

do_pattern: Size contrast and spacing to show importance
do_code: h1: 48px h2: 36px h3: 24px body: 16px with proportional spacing

do_pattern: Rem or em for accessible scaling
do_code: font-size: 1rem; /* respects user font size settings */
dont_pattern: Fixed pixel sizes that don't scale
Cramped or too loose line height
dont_code: line-height: 1; /* cramped text */ or line-height: 3; /* too loose */

rule: Never use color alone to convey info
do_pattern: Add icons patterns or text alongside color
dont_code: color: red; /* only indicator for colorblind users */

rule: Allow closing modals with escape key
dont_code: /* no escape key handler no close button */

do_pattern: Focus stays within modal while open
do_code: Use inert attribute on background or manual focus trapping
dont_code: /* focus can leave modal to hidden background */

do_code: <div class="skeleton" style="height: 20px; border-radius: 4px; background: #e2e8f0; animation: pulse">

dont_pattern: Infinite spinner with no progress indication
dont_code: /* how long will this take? */
/* hover tooltips as only way to see info on mobile */
/* 3 column grid on mobile causes horizontal scroll */
/* user clicks save... nothing happens visible */

do_pattern: Match visual treatment to message importance
do_code: Success: green. Warning: amber. Error: red. Info: blue.
dont_code: /* errors and success look the same */
